nasb.text: But Samuel said, “What then is this bleating of the sheep in my ears, and the lowing of the oxen which I hear?”

esv.text: And Samuel said, “What then is this bleating of the sheep in my ears and the lowing of the oxen that I hear?”

cnv.text: 撒母耳說：“我耳中聽見有羊叫牛鳴的聲音，到底是甚麼呢？”

ccb.text: 撒母耳说：“那么，我现在听见的牛羊叫声是从哪里来的？”
